gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.learning_rigid_half` (Eidometry thesis, section Experiments).

For rich readout classes, every continuous target on a compact domain can be approximated to any desired accuracy by an explicitly constructed ReLU network. This is the rigid side of the dichotomy, where approximation is total.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1191].

statement.pretty: ∀ {ι : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype ι] (K : Set (ι → ℝ)) [CompactSpace ↑K] (T : C(↑K, ℝ)) {ε : ℝ}, 0 < ε → ∃ N, ∀ (x : ↑K), |T x - ZPM.ReLU.ReLUNet.eval N ↑x| < ε

title: Eidometry.Thesis.learning_rigid_half
